title: Reserving competitions for below-threshold contracts
body: "In preparation for the Local Government (Exclusion of Non-commercial Considerations) (England) Order 2026 coming into force in early 2026, we are publishing guidance for relevant authorities to take into consideration when planning forthcoming below-threshold procurements.  When in force, the legislation will disapply the restriction in section 17(5)(e) of the Local Government Act 1988 that previously prevented authorities from reserving below-threshold contracts by reference to the location of contractors. The disapplication will apply only in specific circumstances and in relation to the award of below-threshold contracts.  The guidance explains:   how authorities may reserve competitions to suppliers based within the local area or UK how to define local area and supplier location options for reserving competitions for SME and VCSEs, either with or without the area reservation requirements in notices that must be published safeguards to ensure compliance with section 17 of the Local Government Act 1988  "
